name: Bishop Dr. Colin Nyathi
content: Bishop Dr. Colin Nyathi is the founder and senior pastor of Harvest House International Church (HHICC), headquartered in Harare, Zimbabwe. A visionary leader and apostolic voice across Africa, he hosts the Generation Next conference to raise and equip the next generation of church leaders.

achievements.title: Founder
achievements.description: Founder of Harvest House International Church, one of Zimbabwe's largest and most influential ministries.

achievements.title: Apostolic Leader
achievements.description: Recognized apostolic voice shaping church leadership across Africa and the diaspora.

achievements.title: Generation Next
achievements.description: Convener of the Generation Next conference — a gathering that has impacted thousands of ministers and church leaders.

name: Bishop Dr. Sarah Nyathi
content: Bishop Dr. Sarah Nyathi serves alongside Bishop Dr. Colin Nyathi as co-host of the Generation Next conference. A respected minister and leader within Harvest House International Church, she brings a strong pastoral heart and prophetic insight to the gathering.

achievements.title: Conference Host
achievements.description: Co-host of the Generation Next conference, a premier gathering for ministers and church leaders across Africa.

achievements.title: Pastoral Leadership
achievements.description: Senior pastoral figure at Harvest House International Church, serving the body of Christ with compassion and wisdom.

achievements.title: Women in Leadership
achievements.description: A trailblazer championing women in ministry and church leadership across the region.

name: Pastor Tom Deuschle
content: Pastor Tom Deuschle is the founding pastor of Celebration Church (formerly Celebration Ministries International) in Harare, Zimbabwe. A transformational leader, author, and visionary, he has dedicated decades to building the local church and shaping Christian leadership in Zimbabwe and beyond.

achievements.title: Church Founder
achievements.description: Founding pastor of Celebration Church, one of Zimbabwe's most prominent and influential congregations.

achievements.title: Author & Communicator
achievements.description: Author of multiple books on leadership, family, and church building.

achievements.title: Nation Builder
achievements.description: Recognized for significant community development and social impact work across Zimbabwe.

name: Prophet Emmanuel Makandiwa
content: Prophet Emmanuel Makandiwa is the founder and leader of the United Family International Church (UFIC), one of the largest and fastest-growing churches in Africa. Known for his prophetic ministry and mass evangelism, he draws hundreds of thousands to his meetings across the continent.

achievements.title: Church Founder
achievements.description: Founder of United Family International Church (UFIC), one of Africa's largest congregations.

achievements.title: Prophetic Ministry
achievements.description: Internationally recognised prophet whose ministry has impacted millions across Africa and the diaspora.

achievements.title: Mass Evangelism
achievements.description: Convener of mass crusades and prophetic gatherings drawing hundreds of thousands of attendees.

name: Prophetess Memory Matimbire
content: Prophetess Memory Matimbire is a renowned prophetic minister and founder of Faith in Action International Ministries. Based in Zimbabwe, she is celebrated across Africa for her powerful prophetic gifts, healing ministry, and anointed preaching.

achievements.title: Ministry Founder
achievements.description: Founder of Faith in Action International Ministries, impacting thousands through prophetic ministry.

achievements.title: Prophetic Voice
achievements.description: One of Africa's most prominent prophetic voices, known for accurate and life-changing prophetic ministry.

achievements.title: Women in Ministry
achievements.description: An inspiration to women in ministry across Africa, breaking barriers and raising up the next generation.

name: Apostle Tavonga Vutabwashe
content: Apostle Tavonga Vutabwashe is a dynamic apostolic leader and founder of Living Waters International Church. A gifted communicator and church planter, he has a passion for raising strong, Spirit-filled leaders across Africa.

achievements.title: Apostolic Leader
achievements.description: Recognised apostolic figure with a mandate to plant and strengthen churches across Africa.

achievements.title: Gifted Communicator
achievements.description: Known for clear, powerful, and transformative preaching that connects with audiences of all ages.

achievements.title: Youth Champion
achievements.description: Passionate about engaging and raising the next generation of ministry leaders.

name: Apostle Batsirai Java
content: Apostle Batsirai Java is a powerful apostolic minister and founder of Kingdom Embassy Ministries. Known for his healing and deliverance ministry, he moves in signs and wonders and carries a strong mandate to disciple and raise leaders.

achievements.title: Healing Ministry
achievements.description: Moves in notable signs and wonders, with documented healings and miracles across his crusades.

achievements.title: Apostolic Mandate
achievements.description: Carries a strong apostolic mandate to establish and strengthen the church in Zimbabwe and beyond.

achievements.title: Discipleship
achievements.description: Committed to raising and discipling the next generation of church leaders.

name: Bishop Chemani S. Tuturu
content: Bishop Chemani S. Tuturu is a respected bishop and senior church leader with decades of ministry experience. Known for his depth of teaching and strong apostolic foundation, he is a trusted voice in the Zimbabwean church landscape.

achievements.title: Senior Bishop
achievements.description: Decades of episcopal leadership shaping the church in Zimbabwe and the broader region.

achievements.title: Teaching Ministry
achievements.description: Renowned for deep, doctrinally grounded teaching that builds up the body of Christ.

achievements.title: Mentor to Ministers
achievements.description: A trusted mentor and father figure to many pastors and church leaders across Zimbabwe.
